title: First screen, Close button
scenario: Onboarding first screen Close button returns user to Supported Devices or Home screen instead of exiting onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. On the Home screen, tap the 'Add Device' or 'Supported Devices' option to begin onboarding a new device.
3. On the first onboarding screen (e.g., 'Connect Your Device' or similar), locate the Close button (X) in the upper right corner.
expected: The user is returned to the original start screen (Home screen or Supported Devices screen).
